name: Grok2API
description: Grok2API – FastAPI-based reverse proxy for Grok, supporting streaming/non-streaming chat, image generation, deep thinking, and token pool management.

LOG_LEVEL.description: Log level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR

LOG_FILE_ENABLED.description: Whether to write logs to file (set false on Heroku where filesystem is ephemeral)

DATA_DIR.description: Directory for persistent data (config, tokens). Use /tmp/data on Heroku (ephemeral).

SERVER_STORAGE_TYPE.description: Storage backend: local, redis, mysql, pgsql. When DATABASE_URL is set, SERVER_STORAGE_URL is empty, and this is 'local', pgsql is used automatically.

SERVER_STORAGE_URL.description: Connection URL for redis/mysql/pgsql storage. Leave empty to use DATABASE_URL from the Heroku Postgres add-on.
